query: Set up a CI pipeline for this repo that runs our test suite on every PR and fails the build when tests fail or coverage drops below threshold.
I want to create quality gates in CI/CD — scaffold a GitHub Actions workflow that executes the tests, enforces a coverage gate, and blocks merges on failure.
We have a passing test suite but no continuous integration — generate a pipeline config that runs the tests and gates promotion on a clean run.
We don't have a testing framework yet — initialize Playwright for this project with config and a sample test.
Review these existing test files for quality problems — flag hard waits, missing assertions, and shared state.
Audit our non-functional requirements against the implementation evidence and grade performance, security, and reliability.
